narrative: During a power outage, one person has an extra lantern battery while several nearby residents are trying to finish essential tasks before nightfall. Keeping the battery would make their own evening easier, but sharing it would help others manage safely.
high_response: I will lend the spare battery so others can finish what they need to do safely. My evening may be less convenient, but the benefit to several people is worth sharing the resource.
low_response: I will keep the spare battery for my own use. I need to make sure my own tasks are handled first, and I cannot be responsible for solving everyone else's shortage.
